summary: iter243 testing complete. All 15 backend tests passed. All new features verified: VIP at-the-door widget (4 VIPs with glow animation), VIP Issue QR button, NFC/QR scan endpoint, BEO auto-chat creation, Voice→BEO draft via Claude. Frontend verified: widget visible top-left, VIP detail shows CHECK-IN + ISSUE QR buttons, Banquet tab has 🎙 NEW BEO button + bqt-chat-btn in BEO detail.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter243 adds: (1) VIP at-the-door floating widget showing up to 6 in-house VIPs with glow on recent activity, tap opens chat. (2) Auto-create chat per BEO with system summary. (3) VIP NFC/QR scan endpoint + Issue QR button on VIP detail. (4) Voice→BEO drafting using Claude with heuristic fallback. All endpoints leadership-gated (X-User-Id: chef-william). Voice draft uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for Claude, falls back to regex heuristic if unavailable.

vip_at_door_widget.details: data-testid='vip-at-door-widget' visible top-left, renders vip-door-{id} avatar buttons (4 VIPs), recent VIPs have glow animation

vip_issue_token.details: POST /api/vip-tracker/{id}/issue-token returns vipscan-XXXX token, multiple tokens per VIP supported

vip_scan.details: POST /api/vip-tracker/scan with valid token returns vip_id + checkin_id, invalid token returns 404

beo_chat.details: POST /api/maestro/beo/{id}/chat creates room with kind='beo', auto-posts system summary, second call returns reused:true

voice_beo_draft.details: POST /api/maestro/beo/draft creates BEO with status='draft' and source='voice-draft', extracts guest_count from text

frontend_bqt_voice_modal.details: bqt-voice-draft-btn opens modal with bqt-voice-text, bqt-voice-mic, bqt-voice-submit

frontend_bqt_chat_btn.details: bqt-chat-btn visible in BEO detail, shows '🎩 CREATE BEO TEAM CHAT' or '💬 OPEN BEO CHAT'

mocked_apis_note: Voice→BEO uses real Claude via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. NFC scanning hardware is not real — the scan endpoint just resolves a token string.
